name: Cars Card
desc_it: Card 3D con effetto pop-out in CSS puro. Niente JavaScript — solo transform e perspective.
desc_en: 3D pop-out card built with pure CSS. No JavaScript — just transform and perspective.

name: Magnetic Button
desc_it: Bottone magnetico che segue il cursore con effetto calamita, spotlight luminoso e bordo gradient animato.
desc_en: Magnetic button that follows the cursor with a spring effect, moving light spotlight and animated gradient border.
